description: Enforcing first-pass quality gates for task scope, evidence, production identity, compaction, delegation, and completion. Runtime requires pwsh 7 on PATH.

hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command '& { $root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { throw "plugin root is unavailable" }; & (Join-Path $root "skills/first-pass-quality-gate/scripts/quality-control.ps1") -Action Hook }'
hooks.commandWindows: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = if ($env:PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:PLUGIN_ROOT } elseif ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { throw 'plugin root is unavailable' }; & (Join-Path $root 'skills/first-pass-quality-gate/scripts/quality-control.ps1') -Action Hook"
